zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Belknap於大約1481年出生在英國時，她的父親Henry Belknap54歲，母親Margaret Knollys52歲。她於1511年7月10日與Sir William Shelley在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1538年1月4日在英國素可可拉法姆享年58歲，埋葬在英國素可可拉法姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Belknap于大约1481年出生在英国时，她的父亲Henry Belknap54岁，母亲Margaret Knollys52岁。她于1511年7月10日与Sir William Shelley在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1538年1月4日在英国素可可拉法姆享年58岁，埋葬在英国素可可拉法姆。

nameMeanings.name: Belknap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place, the second element of which is most likely Middle English knappe ‘hilltop’. Compare Belnap .
History: Abraham Belknap (c. 1588–c. 1643) emigrated from Latton, Essex, England, to Lynn, MA, in the 1630s.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Belknap was born about 1481, in England, her father, Henry Belknap, was 54 and her mother, Margaret Knollys, was 52. She married Sir William Shelley on 10 July 1511, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 4 January 1538, in Clapham, Sussex, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Clapham, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Belknap est née environ 1481, à Angleterre, son père, Henry Belknap, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Margaret Knollys, avait 52 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Shelley le 10 juillet 1511, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 janvier 1538, à Clapham, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Clapham, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Belknap um 1481 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Belknap 54 und ihre Mutter Margaret Knollys 52. Sie hat am 10. Juli 1511 in England Sir William Shelley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Januar 1538 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Clapham, Sussex, England und wurde in Clapham, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Belknap è nata il circa 1481 nel England, sua padre, Henry Belknap, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Margaret Knollys, aveva 52 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Shelley il 10 luglio 1511, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 4 gennaio 1538, nel Clapham, Sussex, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Clapham, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Belknapが約1481年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Henry Belknapは54歳，母Margaret Knollysは52歳であった。1511年7月10日にイギリスでSir William Shelleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1538年1月4日にイギリススセックスクラファムで58歳で死去し，イギリススセックスクラファムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Belknap(이)가 대략 1481년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Belknap(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Knollys(은)는 52세였다. 그녀는 1511년 7월 10일 영국에서 Sir William Shelley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1538년 1월 4일 영국 수세스 클라프아에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 클라프아에 묻혔다.

mn.Michelgrove Manor, Clapham, Sussex, Engl: Clapham, Sūþsēaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Belknap nasceu aproximadamente 1481, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Belknap, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Knollys, tinha 52 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Shelley em 10 de julho de 1511, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de janeiro de 1538, em Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Belknap родилась около 1481 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Belknap было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Knollys, 52. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Shelley 10 июля 1511 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 4 января 1538 г. в местности клафам, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности клафам, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Belknap nació aproximadamente 1481, en Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Belknap, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Margaret Knollys, tenía 52 años. Se casó con Sir William Shelley el 10 de julio de 1511, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 4 de enero de 1538, en Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra.
